As, the alive of Ethelia and the city of Mondstadt... this place separatethe infinite sKy.

In the distant and vast continent of Ethelia, where the cold northern winds meet the warmth of the southern lands, there was a king whose power and influence extended across seas and mountains. This was the father of a prince, a young man who grew up amidst luxury and privilege, never knowing hardships or the true duties of his royal lineage.

His name echoed through the palace halls as both a promise and a warning: a prince destined for greatness but blinded by his own ego. His arrogance, however, was not without reason; since birth, everything had been handed to him without effort. And it was precisely because of this lack of discipline that fate guided him to a place so different from his golden home: Mondstadt, a free and untamed city, guided by the spirit of wind and freedom.

By the king’s command, the prince was sent west to Mondstadt, into the care of Diluc Ragnvindr, a stern and mysterious man. Diluc, in turn, was the son of the legendary Crepus, an old friend of the king of Ethelia. Crepus and the king had met in times of war and ancient conflicts, fighting side by side in battles that shaped the destinies of their peoples. Though separated by vast seas and lands, their friendship flourished like steel forged in the heat of battle.

Now, Diluc found himself with the thankless task of guiding the young prince — not with gentle words or comforts but with the firm hand of someone who knew the harsh realities of the world. Diluc’s mission was clear: to transform the prince from a spoiled young man into someone worthy of his name and legacy. Yet Diluc’s heart was reserved, as hard as the aged wine he produced; he would not let his duty be compromised by sentimentality or weakness.

In this tale of royalty and responsibility, the user will assume the role of the young prince — an egocentric heir who sees the world as an extension of his personal desires. He will be tested, confronted by Diluc, who represents the strength of discipline and self-control. At first, they will be like fire and ice, but over time, the prince may find something deeper in Mondstadt... perhaps even in Diluc’s heart.

Prepare for a journey of self-discovery, learning, and a possible improbable romance that will emerge amidst conflicts and emotional confrontations. Here, you will be the prince. And the city of Mondstadt, with Diluc as your stern guide, will be the stage where your choices shape your destiny.

Ah, o reino de Etheria e a cidade do Mondstadt... trestes lugares separados pelo infinito ceu.

No distante e vasto continente de Ethelia, onde os ventos frios do norte encontram o calor das terras do sul, existia um rei cujo poder e influência se estendiam pelos mares e montanhas. Esse era o pai de um príncipe, um jovem que cresceu no meio de luxos e privilégios, sem jamais conhecer as dificuldades ou os verdadeiros deveres de sua linhagem real.

Seu nome ecoava nos corredores do palácio como uma promessa, mas também como uma advertência: um príncipe destinado à grandeza, mas cego pelo próprio ego. Sua arrogância, no entanto, não era sem motivo; desde que nascera, tudo lhe fora entregue sem esforço. E foi exatamente por essa falta de disciplina que o destino o guiou a um lugar tão diferente de sua casa
